## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Firework to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and future initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/x7KXS5KEXD2nXFyV76ccsu6cAQxYc7Ww?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Published 15 articles, reaching 345 total; backlog to be cleared by weekend](https://fathom.video/share/x7KXS5KEXD2nXFyV76ccsu6cAQxYc7Ww?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [New focus on AI solutions and connected commerce for content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/x7KXS5KEXD2nXFyV76ccsu6cAQxYc7Ww?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [Record-high 2000+ clicks and 1.1M+ impressions in March](https://fathom.video/share/x7KXS5KEXD2nXFyV76ccsu6cAQxYc7Ww?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Need to develop metrics for tracking indirect attribution and funnel progression](https://fathom.video/share/x7KXS5KEXD2nXFyV76ccsu6cAQxYc7Ww?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)

## Topics

### Content Publishing Progress

  - [15 new articles published, total now at 345](https://fathom.video/share/x7KXS5KEXD2nXFyV76ccsu6cAQxYc7Ww?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
  - [Backlog to be cleared by weekend, aiming for 360 total articles](https://fathom.video/share/x7KXS5KEXD2nXFyV76ccsu6cAQxYc7Ww?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [Record-high performance: 2000+ clicks, 1.1M+ impressions in March](https://fathom.video/share/x7KXS5KEXD2nXFyV76ccsu6cAQxYc7Ww?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

### Strategic Content Focus Shift

  - [Moving away from "live video streaming" association](https://fathom.video/share/x7KXS5KEXD2nXFyV76ccsu6cAQxYc7Ww?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)
  - [New emphasis on:](https://fathom.video/share/x7KXS5KEXD2nXFyV76ccsu6cAQxYc7Ww?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
    1.  AI solutions: How Firework uses AI to solve client problems
    2.  Connected commerce: Creating platform for brand-retailer interaction
  - [Goal: Position Firework as video content commerce platform enabling smart sourcing/syndication](https://fathom.video/share/x7KXS5KEXD2nXFyV76ccsu6cAQxYc7Ww?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)

### Connected Commerce Concept

  - [Enables brands to syndicate content to retailers](https://fathom.video/share/x7KXS5KEXD2nXFyV76ccsu6cAQxYc7Ww?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [Helps retailers source and curate brand content efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/x7KXS5KEXD2nXFyV76ccsu6cAQxYc7Ww?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)
  - [Firework platform facilitates video syndication, curation, and targeting](https://fathom.video/share/x7KXS5KEXD2nXFyV76ccsu6cAQxYc7Ww?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
  - [Benefits both brands and retailers in the ecosystem](https://fathom.video/share/x7KXS5KEXD2nXFyV76ccsu6cAQxYc7Ww?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)

### Content Performance Tracking

  - [Need to measure quality and strategic alignment of content](https://fathom.video/share/x7KXS5KEXD2nXFyV76ccsu6cAQxYc7Ww?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
  - [Implement monthly review of categories covered and future focus areas](https://fathom.video/share/x7KXS5KEXD2nXFyV76ccsu6cAQxYc7Ww?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)
  - [Develop metrics for indirect attribution and funnel progression (leads to opportunities)](https://fathom.video/share/x7KXS5KEXD2nXFyV76ccsu6cAQxYc7Ww?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)

### UGC Content Strategy

  - [Shift focus from general UGC topics to more specific, Firework-aligned content](https://fathom.video/share/x7KXS5KEXD2nXFyV76ccsu6cAQxYc7Ww?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [Prioritize topics like:](https://fathom.video/share/x7KXS5KEXD2nXFyV76ccsu6cAQxYc7Ww?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
      - [Ways to boost UGC](https://fathom.video/share/x7KXS5KEXD2nXFyV76ccsu6cAQxYc7Ww?tab=summary&timestamp=1403.0)
      - [Generative AI for UGC](https://fathom.video/share/x7KXS5KEXD2nXFyV76ccsu6cAQxYc7Ww?tab=summary&timestamp=1403.0)
      - [How to generate repeatable, sustainable, and affordable content](https://fathom.video/share/x7KXS5KEXD2nXFyV76ccsu6cAQxYc7Ww?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Consider channel-specific content (e.g., adding videos to emails, websites)](https://fathom.video/share/x7KXS5KEXD2nXFyV76ccsu6cAQxYc7Ww?tab=summary&timestamp=1586.0)

### SEO Keyword Strategy

  - [Focus on engagement-related keywords (e.g., "how to increase engagement with video content")](https://fathom.video/share/x7KXS5KEXD2nXFyV76ccsu6cAQxYc7Ww?tab=summary&timestamp=1651.0)
  - [Avoid pricing-focused content unless deal-specific](https://fathom.video/share/x7KXS5KEXD2nXFyV76ccsu6cAQxYc7Ww?tab=summary&timestamp=1702.0)
  - [Explore topics like "how brands use AI video creation to drive sales"](https://fathom.video/share/x7KXS5KEXD2nXFyV76ccsu6cAQxYc7Ww?tab=summary&timestamp=1725.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Sam to provide a pitch/brief on Firework's problem-solving approach for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/x7KXS5KEXD2nXFyV76ccsu6cAQxYc7Ww?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
  - [Prateek to add new topics based on team suggestions and share with Sam for approval](https://fathom.video/share/x7KXS5KEXD2nXFyV76ccsu6cAQxYc7Ww?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
  - [Update/remove articles mentioning "live stream"; Prateek to provide action plan](https://fathom.video/share/x7KXS5KEXD2nXFyV76ccsu6cAQxYc7Ww?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Set up weekly meetings to track funnel metrics with Steve and team](https://fathom.video/share/x7KXS5KEXD2nXFyV76ccsu6cAQxYc7Ww?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
  - [Implement monthly content strategy review in first weekly meeting of each month](https://fathom.video/share/x7KXS5KEXD2nXFyV76ccsu6cAQxYc7Ww?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)
  - [Prateek to incorporate "repeatable, sustainable, and affordable content" phrasing in future content](https://fathom.video/share/x7KXS5KEXD2nXFyV76ccsu6cAQxYc7Ww?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
